x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR skills and competency data enables Now Assist to match HR case complexity to agent expertise. Without skills data, Now Assist cannot optimize agent assignment based on capability matching.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate HR agent skills and competency profiles via sn_hr_core_skill_list.do. Assign skills to HR service desk agents. Target: 10+ active skill definitions. Now Assist HRSD uses skill matching for AI-optimized case assignment.
